note: Frozen World_Monitor finance snapshot for the POC. Plausible Sat 2026-05-30 close values. Live mode (INTEL_MODE=live) reads these same signals from World_Monitor in production once an API key is provisioned.

brent_oil.relevance: Energy exposure and Gulf-economy linkage; informs Gulf real-estate and alternatives view.

wti_oil.relevance: US energy benchmark; spread to Brent signals global demand balance.

ecb_deposit_rate.relevance: Discount rate for EU fixed income; anchors the 15% EU bond sleeve duration call.

sama_repo_rate.relevance: Gulf monetary stance; cap-rate input for the 15% Gulf real-estate sleeve.

usd_index_dxy.relevance: FX translation risk on the 20% US-tech sleeve for an SEK-base client.

omxs30.relevance: Nordic equity momentum; benchmark for the 35% Nordic equity sleeve.

ig_credit_spread_bps.relevance: Credit risk premium; widening would pressure the EU fixed-income sleeve.

gulf_reit_mom.relevance: Direct read on the 15% Gulf real-estate sleeve performance.
